title: Money Crops
description: Money-themed crops for farming on Hypixel Skyblock
body:
Money-themed crops for farming on Hypixel Skyblock.

![Bundle of Money](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d87386d718168f4df00a70404450b19a67e96c9_0.webp)

Feel like you're making big money while farming

Replace the following crops with these models:

| Crop           | Model           |
|----------------|-----------------|
| Wheat          | Bundle of bills |
| Carrot         | Bundle of bills |
| Potato         | Bundle of bills |
| Pumpkin        | Case of bills   |
| Sugar Cane     | Stack of coins  |
| Melon          | Case of bills   |
| Cactus         | Stack of coins  |
| Cocoa Beans    | Bundle of bills |
| Mushroom       | Bundle of bills |
| Nether Wart    | Bundle of bills |
| Sun/Moonflower | Bundle of bills |
| Wild Rose      | Bundle of bills |
